title: ESTIMATION OF LEAD: GRAVIMETRIC ANALYSIS. WITH PHENYLARSONIC ACID
author: ANIL KUMAR MAJUMDER
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: PhenyIarsonic acid can be utilised as a reagent for the estimation of lead in presence of alkali and alkaline earth metals over a pa range of 6.8 to 7 4. Alkali metals and calcium coprecipitate when present over a certain amount. Coprecipitation of calcium is avoided bit double precipi­tation.
steps_raw: PhenyIarsonic acid can be utilised as a reagent for the estimation of lead in presence of alkali and alkaline earth metals over a pa range of 6.8 to 7 4. Alkali metals and calcium coprecipitate when present over a certain amount. Coprecipitation of calcium is avoided bit double precipi­tation.
